zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche於1238年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉福雷斯時，她的父親Raoul III Seigneur of Fougères34歲，母親Isabella de Craon26歲。她於1254年1月29日與Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune在法國波特-哈倫斯維安盧希南結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1274年在法國波特-哈倫斯維安盧希南享年36歲，埋葬在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易索維尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche于1238年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉福雷斯时，她的父亲Raoul III Seigneur of Fougères34岁，母亲Isabella de Craon26岁。她于1254年1月29日与Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune在法国波特-哈倫斯維安盧希南结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1274年在法国波特-哈倫斯維安盧希南享年36岁，埋葬在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易索維尼。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fougères
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Alcide, Armand, Emile, Fleurette, Thierry.

French (Fougère): topographic name for someone who lived in a place densely grown with ferns, from Old French foug(i)ere ‘fern, bracken’ (from Late Latin filicaria); or a habitational name from (La) Fougère, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Fugere .

History: Jean Fougère from Poupry in Eure-et-Loir, France, married first Marie Bourg in Port-Royal in Acadia (now Annapolis Royal in NS, Canada) in 1713, and second Marie-Madeleine Belliveau in Port-Toulouse (St. Peters), NS, Canada, c. 1728.

variants.name: Fugere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Celine, Emile, Gilles, Lucien, Normand, Philippe, Pierre, Sylvian.
French (Fugère): variant of Fougère (see Fougere ) and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche was born in 1238, in Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, her father, Raoul III Seigneur of Fougères, was 34 and her mother, Isabella de Craon, was 26. She married Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune on 29 January 1254, in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1274, in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, at the age of 36, and was buried in Sauvigny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche est née en 1238, à Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Raoul III Seigneur of Fougères, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Isabella de Craon, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune le 29 janvier 1254, à Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1274, à Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterrée à Sauvigny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche 1238 in Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raoul III Seigneur of Fougères 34 und ihre Mutter Isabella de Craon 26. Sie hat am 29. Januar 1254 in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1274 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich und wurde in Sauvigny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche è nata il nel 1238 nel Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Raoul III Seigneur of Fougères, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Isabella de Craon, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune il 29 gennaio 1254, nel Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1274, nel Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolta a Sauvigny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marcheが1238年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインフォウグeレスで生まれた時，父Raoul III Seigneur of Fougèresは34歳，母Isabella de Craonは26歳であった。1254年1月29日にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンルシグナンでHugh de Lusignan XII, Bruneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1274年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンルシグナンで36歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーサウヴィグニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche(이)가 1238년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 포우그e레스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raoul III Seigneur of Fougères(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella de Craon(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1254년 1월 29일 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 루시그난에서 Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1274년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 루시그난에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 소비그니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche nasceu em 1238, em Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Raoul III Seigneur of Fougères, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Isabella de Craon, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune em 29 de janeiro de 1254, em Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1274, em Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França, com 36 anos, e foi sepultada em Sauvigny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche родилась в 1238 г. в местности фоугeресь, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Raoul III Seigneur of Fougères было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Isabella de Craon, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune 29 января 1254 г. в местности лусигнан, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1274 г. в местности лусигнан, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция в возрасте 36 лет и была похоронена в местности саувигни, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Fougères Countess of La Marche nació en 1238, en Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Raoul III Seigneur of Fougères, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Isabella de Craon, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Hugh de Lusignan XII, Brune el 29 de enero de 1254, en Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1274, en Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultada en Sauvigny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.
